assumptions: The harness owns expected traces and comparison.
The adapter faithfully exposes the named reference Realization.
Reported events are complete for the adapter-observed boundary.

implementation.interfaceMechanism: NDJSON messages over stdin and stdout
implementation.executionInstructions: Run python3 -m semantic_packages.stack_adapter from the repository root.

limitations: ExecPlan 0001 tracer only; elements are JSON integers in the stack-default profile.
No realization-steps instrumentation or performance evidence.
No registry discovery, remote transport, or concurrent requests.
